findings.message: Breaking schema change: the `name` field on the `Item` GraphQL type was renamed to `title` with no compatible path. Existing clients querying `item.name` will break, since `name` is removed rather than deprecated/aliased. Renames in GraphQL are breaking changes.
findings.suggestion: Keep the existing `name: str` field (optionally with `@strawberry.field(deprecation_reason=...)`) alongside the new `title` field so clients can migrate before `name` is removed, e.g. expose both `name` and `title` resolving from `row.name`.
